data.title: Key press releases this week include a plunge in consumer confidence, plus new partnerships in wildfire and cancer research.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, in New York, there was a significant drop in consumer confidence. Additionally, notable collaborations were formed in the realms of wildfire prevention and cancer research. The week also saw the release of several highly anticipated press releases related to the Big Game. These developments come amidst a flurry of thousands of press releases being issued weekly, underscoring the challenges in standing out in the crowded news landscape.

data.title: ArcBest reports Q4 2025 revenue of $972.7M, down from $1.0B in 2024. Net loss $8.1M, compared to $29.0M profit in 2024.
data.description: ArcBest, a prominent player in supply chain logistics, shared its financial performance for Q4 and full year ending December 31, 2025. The revenue for Q4 2025 stood at $972.7 million, a slight decrease from $1.0 billion in the same period last year. However, the net loss from continuing operations was $8.1 million, equivalent to $0.36 per diluted share, as opposed to a net income of $29.0 million, or $1.24 per diluted share, in Q4 2024. The company has not disclosed further details from the announcement.

data.title: Air Products beat estimated earnings by 4.0%, with EPS of $3.16 (vs. $3.04). Revenue up $171.00 million from last year.
data.description: Air Products (NYSE: APD) unveiled its Q1 financial results on January 30, 2026, at 6:00 AM. The key highlights include surpassing estimated earnings by 4.0%, with an EPS of $3.16 compared to the expected $3.04. Revenue saw a $171.00 million increase from the prior year. In the previous quarter, the company missed EPS expectations by $0.0, resulting in a 0.0% share price change. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Flagstar Bank (NYSE: FLG) beats Q4 estimated earnings by 200% with EPS of $0.06 vs. $0.02 estimate. Revenue down $68 million.
data.description: Flagstar Bank (FLG) released their Q4 earnings on January 30, 2026 at 06:00 AM. The bank exceeded estimated earnings by 200.0%, with an EPS of $0.06 compared to the expected $0.02. Revenue saw a decline of $68.00 million from the previous year. For further insights on historical earnings, including the past quarter's performance, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dorian LPG Ltd. declares $0.70/share cash dividend, returns $29.9M to shareholders, and announces Q3 earnings call date.
data.description: Dorian LPG Ltd., a prominent owner and operator of modern and ECO very large gas carriers (VLGCs), declared an unconventional cash dividend of $0.70 per share of the Company's common stock. This move will return around $29.9 million of capital to shareholders. The company will also release a news update on Thursday, February 5, 2026, before the market opens, revealing its financial results.

data.title: Seadrill extends contract for West Saturn drillship with Equinor Brasil Energia Ltda, adding $114 million to backlog.
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda, Seadrill Limited (NYSE: SDRL) has confirmed that Equinor Brasil Energia Ltda has chosen to exercise a one-year priced option for the ultra-deepwater drillship West Saturn. This decision has contributed an additional $114 million to the contract backlog and extended the original contract, which began in 2022, until October 2027. Seadrill's President and CEO, Simon Johnson, expressed satisfaction, stating that this extends the contract into its sixth consecutive year.

data.title: ArcBest (NASDAQ: ARCB) missed Q4 earnings estimates by -16%. EPS was $0.36 vs. estimated $0.43. Revenue down $29.31 million.
data.description: ArcBest (NASDAQ: ARCB) released its Q4 earnings on January 30, 2026, at 06:00 AM. The company's earnings report revealed that they missed estimated earnings by -16.0%, recording an EPS of $0.36 compared to the expected $0.43. Furthermore, ArcBest experienced a $29.31 million decline in revenue from the previous year. It is worth noting that in their previous earnings report, ArcBest surpassed expectations on EPS. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: NinjaTrader expands into Europe, launching in Netherlands and Germany to support retail futures traders; plans to expand across EU.
data.description: In light of significant expansion prospects and surging demand, a prominent provider of retail futures and trading technology has initiated operations in the Netherlands and Germany, with intentions to broaden its reach to encompass the entirety of the EU. This move by NinjaTrader Group, a key player in the retail futures trading sector, comes as a response to swift growth and increasing market requirements. On January 30, 2026, the company unveiled its ambitious plans to penetrate the European market, fostering its global presence and catering to the escalating demands of investors in the region.
Overall voting privileges amounted to 100 million.
TCM Group A/S seeks new CFO following change in executive management.

data.title: Breg attains HITRUST certification for Breg Vision and Vision Clarity, maintaining high security standards.
data.description: In Carlsbad, California on January 30, 2026, Breg revealed their accomplishment of obtaining HITRUST certification. This signifies the company's dedication to upholding top-notch security, privacy, and compliance levels within its digital offerings, which encompass Breg Vision and other platforms.

data.title: SuperX launches production at its first global supply center in Japan, leveraging local expertise. OSAKA, Jan. 30, 2026.
data.description: SuperX AI Technology Limited (NASDAQ: SUPX) unveiled plans to capitalize on Japan's advantageous location and tap into local engineering expertise to cater to international markets. The announcement was made in Osaka, Japan on January 30, 2026. SuperX, an up-and-coming AI Data Center infrastructure solutions provider, is strategically positioning itself to leverage the global market.

data.title: Digital Silk's case study on Procom Service's website relaunch shows a 16.28% increase in session duration.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, in Miami, Digital Silk, a digital agency specializing in branding, custom web design, and digital marketing, released data on the impact of a website relaunch for Procom Service in August 2025. The report discusses the changes in engagement levels seen post the redesign, showcasing noteworthy improvements in user interactions and digital presence.

data.title: Americans will legally wager $1.76 billion on Super Bowl LX, showcasing growth of legal sports betting market.
data.description: According to the American Gaming Association (AGA), it is projected that Americans will place unprecedented legal bets totaling $1.76 billion on Super Bowl LX. This amount highlights the ongoing expansion and robustness of the regulated sports betting market in various states and tribal regions. The AGA's estimation underlines the escalating popularity and financial significance of legal sports wagering in the country.

data.title: Air Products surpassed Q1 guidance, showing resilience in base business. EPS of $3.04, a 10% increase. Focus on growth and discipline.
data.description: Surpassing expectations in the first quarter, the company showcased its robustness and resilience in its core operations. With a relentless commitment to enhancing profitability, optimizing major initiatives, and upholding fiscal prudence, they delivered compelling results in Q1 FY26. The GAAP earnings per share stood at $3.04, marking a 10% increase from the previous period. Their unwavering efforts to drive growth and efficiency have evidently paid off, setting a solid foundation for future performance.

data.description: On January 30, 2026, IDEAYA Biosciences, Inc., headquartered in South San Francisco, revealed its latest development. data.title: Happiest Minds (NSE: HAPPSTMNDS) partners with IBSFINtech to enhance enterprise treasury operations.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, Happiest Minds Technologies Limited, a digital engineering and IT company based in Bengaluru, India, revealed a new collaboration with IBSFINtech. Happiest Minds Technologies Limited, listed on the NSE as HAPPSTMNDS, is known for prioritizing AI and customer satisfaction in its services. IBSFINtech is a prominent supplier of Treasury solutions.

data.title: SUI Price Prediction: Expect bounce to $1.50-$1.85 by Feb 2026 from oversold $1.28 level, RSI 28.69. Resist. at $1.41.
data.description: The current trading price for Sui stands at $1.28, showing an oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 28.69, indicating a possible upward movement. Technical analysis forecasts recovery targets of $1.50 to $1.85 by February, with a significant resistance level at $1.41.
